originalWords.unicode: ὁ ὢν καί ὁ ἦν καί ὁ ἐρχόμενος
originalWords.transliteration: ho ṑn kaí ho ēn kaí ho erchómenos

description: the one being and the one that was and the one coming, i.e., the eternal, as a divine epithet of christ
origin: a phrase combining g3588 with the present participle and imperfect of g1510 and the present participle of g2064 by means of g2532
